# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
  labels:
    app: batch-processing
spec:
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: default
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
      restartPolicy: Always
      securityContext:
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: processor
          image: your-registry/your-batch-processor:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          args:
            - /app/process
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          startupProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - test -x /app/process
            failureThreshold: 30
            periodSeconds: 2
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - test -f /tmp/ready || exit 0
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 6
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - test -f /tmp/alive || exit 0
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 3
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command:
                  - /bin/sh
                  - -c
                  - sleep 10
          env:
            - name: TZ
              value: UTC
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp
          emptyDir: {}
